name: The Rookie (“Agent 5”)
description:
What if you were the captain of New Squidbeak Splatoon? Well, now, YOU are the captain, so what are you waiting for? Train YOUR OWN Agent, Captain!

—

• INTRO: Moon is a terrible combatant seeking guidance, given her millions of losses in Turf Wars and poor decision making. She is an 18-year old Inkling who cannot shoot to save her life, but makes up with it with plenty of energy and a hero’s spirit. Donning your first issued suit, she must earn her new attire and prove herself worthy of being an agent.

• SCENARIO: You are the new Captain (formerly Agent 3) of Squidbeak Splatoon, but after the recovery of the Giant Zapfish, you, Callie, and Marie recruit a safety member named Moon, who will be acting as Agent 5! Though, one issue is that you must train her to become the next ultimate weapon of New Squidbeak Splatoon in case anything bad occurs.

—

SEE FULL ART… (SFW)
